The size of the coat indicates it belonged to someone else.
It has been fixed a couple of times, but it still shows signs of wear. | | Elite 1 | | --- | | ![Amiya Elite 1](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/c/c4/Amiya_Elite_1.png/revision/latest?cb=20190619214426) | The outfit Amiya wears most often. The size of the coat indicates it belonged to someone else. Despite that, the meticulous repairs she's done on it makes it look as good as new. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Amiya Elite 2](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/b/b9/Amiya_Elite_2.png/revision/latest?cb=20190619214434) | This coat needs to be mended,
and the wounds still need to heal. | | Newsgirl | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 1](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/1/14/Amiya_Skin_1.png/revision/latest?cb=20190831014828) | One of Amiya's favorite outfits.
_The sky of Londinium is always gray._
Test Collection/Newsgirl. Available only in certain regions, this remake of a classic design utilizes the best materials and contains carefully-sewn details. An extra custom-made letter opener is included.
**Acquisition**
- [Opening Event Part 2](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Opening_Event_Part_2 "Opening Event Part 2") (Event Mission)
- [Permanent Trade Center](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Permanent_Trade_Center "Permanent Trade Center") (since [Contingency Contract Barrenland](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Contingency_Contract_Barrenland "Contingency Contract Barrenland"), 300 [![Contract Bounty icon](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/6/68/Contract_Bounty_icon.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/20?cb=20210429233720)](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Contract_Bounty "Contract Bounty")) | | Fresh Fastener | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 2](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/9/95/Amiya_Skin_2.png/revision/latest?cb=20200501183629) | One of Amiya's casual outfits.
_The mysterious shopkeeper signed a dream-like agreement with the young lass, Amiya, hoping that she would be able to deliver love and piping-hot food to every customer._
Test Collection Series/Fresh Fastener. An outfit worn by Amiya while working for a Rhodes Island restaurant. This poofy coat is cold-resistant, and has enough room to hold something penguin-sized.
**Acquisition**
- [1st Anniversary Celebration](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/1st_Anniversary_Celebration "1st Anniversary Celebration") Part 1 (Login Event, Day 14)
- [Permanent Trade Center](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Permanent_Trade_Center "Permanent Trade Center") (since [Contingency Contract Basepoint](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Contingency_Contract_Basepoint "Contingency Contract Basepoint"), 300 [![Contract Bounty icon](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/6/68/Contract_Bounty_icon.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/20?cb=20210429233720)](https://arknights.fandom.com/wiki/Contract_Bounty "Contract Bounty")) | | Planter | | --- | | ![Amiya Skin 3](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/mrfz/images/6/69/Amiya_Skin_3.png/revision/latest?cb=20210417160550) | One of Amiya's casual outfits.
_To plant and cultvate for the future._
Test Collection Series. A comfortable travel outfit with a small hiking bag and a seedling set. The designer has a simple wish that others could help her fulfil.
